crd=networksecurityfirewallendpointassociations.networksecurity.cnrm.cloud.google.com version=v1beta1: CRD has non-boilerplate field 'updateTime' under 'status'
crd=networksecurityfirewallendpoints.networksecurity.cnrm.cloud.google.com version=v1beta1: CRD has non-boilerplate field 'associatedNetworks' under 'status'
crd=networksecurityfirewallendpoints.networksecurity.cnrm.cloud.google.com version=v1beta1: CRD has non-boilerplate field 'updateTime' under 'status'
crd=tagslocationtagbindings.tags.cnrm.cloud.google.com version=v1beta1: CRD has non-boilerplate field 'name' under 'status'
